recommendations.title: Henry V
recommendations.overview: In 1415, in the midst of the Hundred Years' War, the young King Henry V of England embarks on the conquest of France.

recommendations.title: Artemis Fowl
recommendations.overview: Artemis Fowl is a 12-year-old genius and descendant of a long line of criminal masterminds. He soon finds himself in an epic battle against a race of powerful underground fairies who may be behind his father's disappearance.

recommendations.title: Hamlet
recommendations.overview: Hamlet, Prince of Denmark, returns home to find his father murdered and his mother now marrying the murderer... his uncle. Meanwhile, war is brewing.

recommendations.title: Dead Again
recommendations.overview: In 1949, composer Roman Strauss is executed for the murder of his wife. In 1990s Los Angeles, a detective comes across a mute amnesiac woman who is somehow linked to the Strauss murder.

recommendations.title: Murder on the Orient Express
recommendations.overview: Genius Belgian detective Hercule Poirot investigates the murder of an American tycoon aboard the Orient Express train.

recommendations.title: Thor: Love and Thunder
recommendations.overview: After his retirement is interrupted by Gorr the God Butcher, a galactic killer who seeks the extinction of the gods, Thor Odinson enlists the help of King Valkyrie, Korg, and ex-girlfriend Jane Foster, who now wields Mjolnir as the Mighty Thor. Toget

recommendations.title: Cinderella
recommendations.overview: When her father unexpectedly passes away, young Ella finds herself at the mercy of her cruel stepmother and her daughters. Never one to give up hope, Ella's fortunes begin to change after meeting a dashing stranger in the woods.

recommendations.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit
recommendations.overview: Jack Ryan, as a young covert CIA analyst, uncovers a Russian plot to crash the U.S. economy with a terrorist attack.

recommendations.title: Sleuth
recommendations.overview: Locked in a high-tech English manor, bound in a deadly duel of wits, Andrew Wyke and Milo Tindle come together as English gentlemen to discuss the matter of Wyke's wife: the woman both are sleeping with.

recommendations.title: Thor: The Dark World
recommendations.overview: Thor fights to restore order across the cosmos… but an ancient race led by the vengeful Malekith returns to plunge the universe back into darkness. Faced with an enemy that even Odin and Asgard cannot withstand, Thor must embark on his most perilous
